languages.text: На военном совете ни одна из сторон не сможет склонить чашу весов без вмешательства Вольного Торговца. Лария предлагает положиться на союзников и держать оборону.

traits.locale_text: На военном совете ни одна из сторон не сможет склонить чашу весов без вмешательства Вольного Торговца. Лария предлагает положиться на союзников и держать оборону.

languages.text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.
languages.original_text: На военном совете ни одна из сторон не сможет склонить чашу весов без вмешательства Вольного Торговца. Лария предлагает положиться на союзников и держать оборону.

traits.locale_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.
At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.
During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.
During the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the Rogue Trader's intervention. Laria proposes trusting in their allies and maintaining the defence.
At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

languages.text: Während des Kriegsrates kann keine Seite ohne die Intervention {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} das Blatt zu ihren Gunsten wenden. Laria schlägt vor, sich auf die Verbündeten der Dynastie zu verlassen und die Verteidigung zu stärken.
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

traits.locale_text: Während des Kriegsrates kann keine Seite ohne die Intervention {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} das Blatt zu ihren Gunsten wenden. Laria schlägt vor, sich auf die Verbündeten der Dynastie zu verlassen und die Verteidigung zu stärken.

languages.text: Pendant le conseil de guerre, aucun camp ne peut gagner sans l'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Laria propose de compter sur les alliés de la dynastie et de maintenir les défenses.
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

traits.locale_text: Pendant le conseil de guerre, aucun camp ne peut gagner sans l'intervention {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Laria propose de compter sur les alliés de la dynastie et de maintenir les défenses.

languages.text: 在军事议会上，如果没有行商浪人的介入，任何一方都无法真正占据上风。菈丽雅提议依靠王朝的盟友，继续坚守防线。
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

traits.locale_text: 在军事议会上，如果没有行商浪人的介入，任何一方都无法真正占据上风。菈丽雅提议依靠王朝的盟友，继续坚守防线。

languages.text: Ninguno de los bandos implicados en el consejo de guerra pueden inclinar la balanza en su favor sin la intervención {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Laria propone confiar en los aliados de la dinastía y mantener la defensa.
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

traits.locale_text: Ninguno de los bandos implicados en el consejo de guerra pueden inclinar la balanza en su favor sin la intervención {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Laria propone confiar en los aliados de la dinastía y mantener la defensa.

languages.text: Savaş konseyinde Hür Tacir'in müdahalesi olmadan hiçbir taraf dengeyi bozamaz. Laria'nın önerisi, hanedanlığın müttefiklerine güvenmeyi ve savunmayı sürdürmek.
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

traits.locale_text: Savaş konseyinde Hür Tacir'in müdahalesi olmadan hiçbir taraf dengeyi bozamaz. Laria'nın önerisi, hanedanlığın müttefiklerine güvenmeyi ve savunmayı sürdürmek.

languages.text: 戦争評議会では、両陣営ともローグトレーダーの介入なしには戦況を左右できない。ラリアの提案は、王朝同盟の同盟国に頼り、防衛を維持することである。
languages.original_text: At the war council, neither side can tip the scales without the intervention of the Rogue Trader. Laria's proposal is to rely on the dynasty's allies and maintain the defence.

traits.locale_text: 戦争評議会では、両陣営ともローグトレーダーの介入なしには戦況を左右できない。ラリアの提案は、王朝同盟の同盟国に頼り、防衛を維持することである。
